member.name: T:Prime.TpSettingsService.ITpSettingsService
member.summary: ITpSettingsService to set general purpose TP configurations.

member.name: M:Prime.TpSettingsService.ITpSettingsService.IsTpFeatureEnabled(Prime.TpSettingsService.BoolTpFeature,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: if the name is not exist will throw exception.

remarks.example:
This is a code example:
bool resultValue = Prime.Services.TpSettingsService>.Service.IsTpFeatureEnabled(name, sessionContext);

member.name: M:Prime.TpSettingsService.ITpSettingsService.EnableTestProgramDebug(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Enables the test program debug mode.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TpSettingsService.ITpSettingsService.DisableTestProgramDebug(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Disables the test program debug mode.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

remarks.example:
This is a code example:
Prime.Services.TpSettingsService>.Service. DisableTestProgramDebug(sessionContext);

member.name: M:Prime.TpSettingsService.ITpSettingsService.IsTestProgramDebugEnabled(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns if the test program is debug mode not.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

remarks.example:
This is a code example:
bool resultValue = Prime.Services.TpSettingsService>.Service.IsTestProgramDebugEnabled(sessionContext);

member.name: T:Prime.TpSettingsService.TpSettingsService
member.summary: Implemantation for TpSettingsService class- once we move to fully c# , this class implamentation needs to move to the base class.

member.name: M:Prime.TpSettingsService.TpSettingsService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TpSettingsService.TpSettingsService.DisableTpFeature(Prime.TpSettingsService.BoolTpFeature,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: This function set the TP feature to disable.
member.param: Name of the feature to disable.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TpSettingsService.TpSettingsService.EnableTpFeature(Prime.TpSettingsService.BoolTpFeature,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: This function set the TP feature to enable.
member.param: Name of the feature to enable.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.TpSettingService.TpSettingsFeatures.TpSettingsFeature
member.summary: Object contains TpSettings features for shared strorage.

member.name: M:Prime.TpSettingService.TpSettingsFeatures.TpSettingsFeature.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
